name: Sauteed Scallops on Red Pepper Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 each Lg Red bell pepper, peeled
recipeInstructions:
1. MAKE THE SAUCE. Place the garlic, bell pepper and tablespoon of yogurt in the bowl of a food processor fitted with a steel blade, and puree until smooth.
2. Scrape the mixture into a small bowl and stir in the remaining yogurt, coriander and black pepper.
3. Whisk in the olive oil, then spoon the sauce onto plates, spreading it out with the back of a spoon.
4. For the scallops, spray a medium-sized skillet with Pam non-stick coating. Add the olive oil, and heat until hot but not smoking.
5. Add the scallops and quickly saute them over high heat until just cooked through, turning often, 2 to 3 minutes.
6. Pour in the vermouth and let it almost evaporate, then add the lemon juice.
7. Cook a few seconds longer so the scallops are glazed.
8. Spoon the scallops onto the plates with the sauce. Sprinkle with coriander leaves and serve at once.
